description: Conquer planets rotating around a sun in a continuous space.
name: orbit_wars

action.description: List of moves to make. Each move is [from_planet_id, direction_angle, num_ships]

actTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) to obtain an action from an agent.

agentTimeout.description: Obsolete field kept for backwards compatibility, please use observation.remainingOverageTime.

cometSpeed.description: Speed of comets in units per turn along their orbital path.

episodeSteps.description: Maximum number of steps in the episode.

runTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) of an episode (not necessarily DONE).

seed.description: Optional input seed for deterministic planet/comet generation. The interpreter clears this from configuration after reading and stores the resolved seed on env.info['seed'] so it stays out of agent observations but is still recorded in the replay. Type allows null because the interpreter scrubs the value to null after reading, and the agent server re-validates the (scrubbed) configuration on every act() call.

shipSpeed.description: Maximum fleet speed per turn. Speed scales with fleet size: 1 ship moves at 1/turn, larger fleets approach this max.

angular_velocity.description: Rotation speed of planets in radians per turn.

comet_planet_ids.description: Planet IDs that are comets (temporary extra-solar objects).

comets.description: Active comet groups with planet_ids, paths, and path_index.

fleets.description: List of active fleets: [id, owner, x, y, angle, from_planet_id, ships]

initial_planets.description: Initial planet positions at game start: [id, owner, x, y, radius, ships, production]

planets.description: List of planets: [id, owner, x, y, radius, ships, production]

remainingOverageTime.description: Total remaining banked time (seconds) that can be used in excess of per-step actTimeouts -- agent is disqualified with TIMEOUT status when this drops below 0.

reward.description: Score at the end of the game.

title: Orbit Wars
